metric_analysis.window_note: Counts reflect docs present after initial backfill / webhook ingestion

meta.vo2_max_when_device_missing: Uses Whoop-style estimate from HRmax (daily max_HR if > 0 else Tanaka), RHR (sleep then daily resting_HR), HRV (sleep).

hr_zones_percent_of_max_hr.note: Boundaries align with <49%, 50–59%, …, ≥90% with [49%,50%) folded into zone 0.

HRV.label: HRV rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

RHR.label: RHR rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

TotalSleep.label: TotalSleep rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

Disruptions.label: Disruptions rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

REM.label: REM rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

DeepSleep.label: DeepSleep rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

LightSleep.label: LightSleep rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

Awake.label: Awake rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean

health_score.headline: Build momentum
health_score.context: You're in the 35th percentile for health metrics among women your age. Phase 1 is about moving your score toward 90+, where phase 2 begins and the focus shifts to longevity.

cards.title: Protect REM Sleep
cards.summary_html: When your 7-day average training intensity stayed above 1.75, your 7-day average REM Sleep tended to remain below 1.2 hours.
cards.chart_caption: Training intensity (7-day average) vs REM Sleep
cards.why_panel: This graph suggests that higher training intensity across the week was usually associated with lower REM sleep, making recovery especially important for protecting long-term REM sleep quality.

correlation.label: REM rolling mean ~ Training Intensity rolling mean
correlation.csvKey: REM rolling mean (7-day)|Training Intensity rolling mean (7-day)

cards.title: Improve Deep Sleep
cards.summary_html: Your deep sleep is 5% lower than average for your age and sex: 57.8 min vs 55.1 min.
cards.chart_caption: Daily Deep Sleep vs demographic average
cards.why_panel: This graph shows that your deep sleep was generally below the demographic average across the last 30 days.

cards.title: Reduce Sleep Disruptions
cards.summary_html: On nights when your sleep disruptions rose above 4.8 per hour, your Light Sleep that night tended to rise above 5.8 hours.
cards.chart_caption: Sleep disruptions (same day) vs Light Sleep
cards.why_panel: The upward direction of the regression line suggests that more sleep disruptions are linked to more light sleep, making sleep continuity important for reducing light sleep duration.

cards.title: Improve REM Sleep
cards.summary_html: On nights when your REM Sleep dropped below 67 min, your next-day HRV tended to fall below 53 ms.
cards.why_panel: The upward direction of the regression line suggests that higher HRV is linked to more rem sleep, making rem sleep quality especially important for recovery.

supplement_recommendation.rationale: Initial recommendation stub after device connect. Replace with rules or ML using metric_analysis.
